heading: Registration of nonbank financial companies supervised by the Board of Governors
label: 5324 Registration of nonbank financial companies supervised by the Board of Governors
text: Not later than 180 days after the date of a final Council determination under that a nonbank financial company is to be supervised by the Board of Governors, such company shall register with the Board of Governors, on forms prescribed by the Board of Governors, which shall include such information as the Board of Governors, in consultation with the Council, may deem necessary or appropriate to carry out this subchapter.section 5323 of this title
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 111–203124 Stat. 1391section 5301 of this titleJuly 21, 2010
